message:
🌱 Align marketplace auto-QA with console auto-qa patterns (#69)

- Create per-category issues instead of one monolithic issue
- Add MAX_ISSUES_PER_RUN rate limiting (3 per run)
- Use ISSUE_PREFIX env var for consistent title formatting
- Add agent_assignment to Copilot assignment (target_repo + base_branch)
- Use console's extractPattern() for dedup (handles count normalization)
- Expand permissions for Copilot (contents:write, pull-requests:write)
- Use CONSOLE_AUTO secret directly (matches console workflow)
- Sort issues: errors first, then enhancements
- Update open duplicates with latest findings + labels
- Per-category fix guidance in issue bodies

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
